products.name: Transformer Oil Filtration Plant
products.shortDescription: Industrial-grade transformer oil filtration plant for power plants, substations, and refineries.
products.description: High-capacity Transformer Oil Filtration Plant engineered for Power Plants, Substations, Transformer OEMs, Oil Refineries, and Steel/Cement industries. Achieves BDV of 70 kV and moisture below 5 PPM.
products.applicationNote: Verified for industrial oil filtration and transformer maintenance installations.

details: Vehicle: truck/trailer mounted for site use
Skid: fixed floor skid with lifting lugs

customizations.description: Stack Disc Separator (for excess water removal)
details: For heavily contaminated or flooded transformer oil
All capacities available in single/double stage

customizations.description: Transformer Oil / Insulating Oil / Hydraulic Oil
details: Different filter media per oil type — specify at order

seo.metaTitle: Transformer Oil Filtration Plant | Alliance Engineering Company
seo.metaDescription: Industrial Transformer Oil Filtration Plant achieving BDV 70 kV and PPM 5. IS 6034-1989 and IEC 60296 compliant.

products.name: Transformer Oil Filtration Machine
products.shortDescription: Portable and stationary transformer oil filtration machine for on-site and plant use.
products.description: Transformer Oil Filtration Machine available in portable and stationary configurations for Power Plants, Substations, OEMs, and on-site maintenance. Achieves BDV 70 kV with vacuum below -760 mmHg.
products.applicationNote: Verified for on-site and plant-based oil filtration and maintenance.

details: Stationary: floor-bolted, higher flow, larger filter chambers
Single stage: coarse + fine filtration, up to 5 micron
Double stage: two vacuum chambers, achieves BDV 70 kV in fewer passes, better moisture removal
PLC: automatic sequence, alarms, interlocks, HMI touchscreen
SCADA: Modbus/RS485 output for remote monitoring
All models include bypass valve for emergency

seo.metaTitle: Transformer Oil Filtration Machine | Alliance Engineering Company
seo.metaDescription: Portable and stationary transformer oil filtration machine. BDV 70 kV, vacuum -760 mmHg. IS 6034-1989 and IEC 60296 compliant.

products.name: Control Transformers

seo.metaDescription: Control Transformers from 25 VA to 25 kVA for panels, CNC, and electroplating. IS 1180, IEC 60076 compliant.

products.name: Battery Chargers
products.shortDescription: Industrial battery chargers for substations, telecom, solar, and UPS applications.
products.description: Industrial Battery Chargers with Float + Boost + CCCV modes for Substations, Telecom, UPS, Solar, and Genset Panels. Input: 220–240V AC, Output: 12/24/48V DC.
products.applicationNote: Verified for industrial substation, telecom, and renewable energy installations.

details: Adjustable current via front-panel pot or DIP switch
Higher current = faster charge but requires larger wire and fuse
Set to C/10 rate for trickle/float, C/5 for boost
Manual: simple, no auto-cutoff, low cost
Automatic SMPS: PFC, regulated, auto float/boost switch
Float-Boost: two-stage constant current then constant voltage, safest for battery life

customizations.description: Panel Mount / Wall Mount / Floor Stand / Rack Mount
details: All options with lockable door available

customizations.description: No Display / LED Indicators / Digital Ammeter+Voltmeter / LCD Status Panel
details: LED: MAINS ON / BOOST / FLOAT / FAULT 3-LED strip
LCD: state of charge %, timer, fault log

seo.metaDescription: Industrial battery chargers with Float+Boost+CCCV modes. IS 8320, IEC 60068, CE, RoHS compliant.

products.name: Buzzer, Hooter & Siren
products.shortDescription: Industrial buzzers, hooters, and sirens for control panels, emergency, and factory alarm systems.
products.description: Industrial Buzzer, Hooter & Siren range for Control Panels, Emergency, Fire Alarm, and Factory applications. Operating voltage: 12–415V AC/DC, Sound: 85–115 dB.
products.applicationNote: Verified for industrial alarm, emergency, and fire detection installations.

customizations.description: Electronic Buzzer / Electronic Hooter / Motor Siren / Bell
details: Buzzer: piezo, 85–95 dB, low current (<50 mA)
Electronic Hooter: 95–105 dB, panel cutout 72×72 mm

customizations.description: 12V DC / 24V DC / 48V DC / 110V AC / 230V AC / 415V AC
details: Must match panel control voltage exactly
AC models: neutral + phase, no polarity

customizations.description: Panel Cutout / Surface Mount / Wall Mount / DIN Rail
details: DIN rail: electronic buzzer clip-on type

customizations.description: With / Without Flasher Light | With / Without Acknowledgement Switch
details: Flasher: built-in 10W red LED strobe, 1–2 Hz
Ack switch: latching contact to silence alarm while fault persists — mandatory for process plants

seo.metaTitle: Buzzer, Hooter & Siren | Alliance Engineering Company
seo.metaDescription: Industrial buzzers, hooters and sirens 85–115 dB for panels, emergency and fire alarm. IS 9000, IEC 60849 compliant.

products.name: Digital & Analog Meters

Analog MC: DC only, mirror scale

customizations.description: Voltmeter / Ammeter / Frequency Meter / VAF (3-in-1) / kV Meter / Power Factor Meter

3Ph 4W: unbalanced loads with neutral — most industrial panels use this

customizations.description: No Comm / RS485 Modbus RTU (digital models only)
details: Modbus RTU: read V/A/Hz/PF remotely from PLC/SCADA

seo.metaTitle: Digital & Analog Meters | Alliance Engineering Company

products.name: DC Shunts
products.shortDescription: Manganin alloy DC shunts for high-accuracy current measurement in industrial applications.
products.description: Manganin alloy DC Shunts for Electroplating, Welding, DC Drives, Battery, and Solar applications. Current range: 10A–10,000A, mV Output: 50/75/100 mV.
products.applicationNote: Verified for high-current DC measurement in industrial and solar installations.

customizations.description: 50 mV / 75 mV / 100 mV at rated current
details: 50 mV: lowest power loss, preferred for high-current
100 mV: highest signal, better for cheap meters
All compatible with ALECS digital meters
Higher accuracy = tighter alloy tolerance, higher cost

customizations.description: Panel / Busbar Direct / Insulated Base / External (floor-standing for >2000A)
details: Panel mount: enclosed, terminals inside panel

seo.metaDescription: Manganin alloy DC Shunts 10A–10,000A with 50/75/100 mV output. IEC 60051, DIN 43703 compliant.

customizations.description: Epoxy Resin / SMC (Sheet Moulding Compound) / DMC (Dough Moulding Compound)
details: Epoxy: highest strength, lowest tracking, best for HV
SMC: good mechanical, cost-effective for LV
DMC: complex shapes, intricate profiles, LV only
